overall.description: First-person exploration footage from a cyberpunk-themed video game (Cyberpunk 2077), showing a walk along a futuristic city street with holographic billboards and passing vehicles, transitioning up a vegetated slope to a concrete plaza with commercial signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with large advertisement billboard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the roadside sidewalk with the camera facing forward toward traffic

notable_agents.action: blue sports car driving past in the left lane

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying advertisement with text 'REAL MAN'S SMELL'
asphalt road with yellow dividing lines and multiple lanes of traffic
grassy hillside covered with palm trees rising alongside the road
tall modern building with glass facade and digital displays

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny futuristic city street with a prominent 'REAL MAN'S SMELL' billboard on the right. The camera walks steadily along the roadside as various cars pass by on the left, with palm-covered hills rising in the distance and modern glass architecture lining the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with holographic building displays

events.description: the large billboard exits the frame as the camera moves past it, revealing more of the futuristic building facade

agents.ego_description: continuing along the roadside, approaching a grassy area at the edge of the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: green car driving past in the left lane

entered.detail: large cyan-colored holographic advertisement projected on the building facade

segments.scene_description: Having passed the billboard, the camera continues along the road with a futuristic glass building now dominating the right side, featuring a large cyan holographic display. Traffic continues to flow on the left while the camera approaches a transition to a vegetated area.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy slope between road and elevated plaza

events.description: leaving the asphalt roadside and moving onto a grassy slope with bushes and small trees
turning right and ascending the grassy incline toward the elevated plaza area

agents.ego_description: moving uphill through grassy terrain and vegetation, away from the road traffic

entered.detail: steep incline covered with tall grass, bushes, and scattered small trees
grey concrete wall running along the right side of the slope

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the roadside and ascends a grassy slope covered in vegetation, with a concrete retaining wall on the right. The road and traffic fall behind as the camera moves uphill through the landscaped terrain toward an elevated urban plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete plaza with stairs leading to commercial district

events.description: exiting the grassy slope onto a paved concrete plaza area
approaching a set of stairs leading up to a commercial area with store signs

agents.ego_description: walking across the concrete plaza toward stairs leading to a commercial area with digital signage

entered.detail: open paved area with smooth concrete surface and planter boxes containing palm trees
wide concrete staircase leading up to a higher commercial level
illuminated commercial signs including 'DRINK' text above store entrances
tall skyscrapers with antennas and digital billboards rising in the background

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges onto a concrete plaza with planter boxes and palm trees, approaching a wide staircase leading up to a commercial district. Futuristic towers with digital signage rise in the background, and the concrete retaining wall now appears on the left as the camera moves toward the stairs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling futuristic city street up into an elevated urban plaza. It begins by walking along a sunny roadside past a prominent REAL MAN'S SMELL billboard and modern glass architecture while traffic flows steadily on the left. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts toward a large cyan holographic display on a glass building before the path diverges from the road. The camera then ascends a vegetated grassy slope beside a concrete retaining wall, leaving the city traffic behind as it climbs toward a higher vantage point. Finally, the movement emerges onto a concrete plaza filled with planter boxes and palm trees, moving toward a wide staircase with towering digital signage rising in the background.
